items.title: You Can Do Way Better Than Truist Financial Stock. Buy and Hold This Forever, Instead.
items.author: Bram Berkowitz
items.description: Truist Financial has underperformed since its 2019 merger of BB&T and SunTrust, failing to deliver promised efficiency and returns. The stock is up only 7% over five years. Bank of America is recommended as a superior alternative, offering stronger returns on tangible common equity and benefiting from maturing underwater bonds and potential deregulation.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Stock has underperformed with only 7% gains over five years despite merger promises. Failed to achieve promised efficiency ratio of 51% (actual 55.7%) and ROTCE of 22% (actual 13.6%). Merger integration issues and customer backlash cited as ongoing problems.

items.title: JPMorgan Cautions on SanDisk’s (SNDK) Long-Term Profitability Despite AI-Driven SSD Supercycle
items.description: Sandisk Corporation (NASDAQ:SNDK) is one of the best performing S&P 500 stocks in 2025. On December 8, JPMorgan initiated coverage of SanDisk with a Neutral rating and $235 price target. The firm noted that SanDisk is well-positioned to capitalize on the AI-driven enterprise SSD supercycle, benefiting from a low-cost structure through its joint venture with […]

items.title: In January, Jamie Dimon Said Bitcoin Is A 'Ponzi'—But Look At JPMorgan's Crypto Moves Now
items.description: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) CEO Jamie Dimon in 2025 maintained his skeptical stance towards Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), even as JPMorgan launched a $100 million Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) fund. The Verbal Offensive Continues Dimon’s public statements in ...
